sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11645" key="a)paulismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαυλ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, seems to be used of <sense id="n11645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a moon-stroke</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit caused by sleeping in the moonlight,</tr_> Poet. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:173" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">173</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
